summary: Complete end-to-end testing of VenuLoQ Venue Acquisition Workflow. Backend: 26/26 tests passed (100%). All venue onboarding endpoints working correctly. Frontend: Specialist dashboard (mobile-first), multi-step venue form (7 steps), VAM dashboard with review queue, Admin Create Employee modal with venue_specialist and vam roles - all working.

issues: Console warning: '<tr> cannot be a child of <span>' hydration error - minor React structure issue but doesn't affect functionality

tests.note: Creates venue draft with vonb_ prefix ID
Updates venue draft, blocked for submitted venues
Adds photo/video with media_ prefix ID
Requires name, city, at least 1 photo
VAM sees all venues with status filter

tests.test: Specialist login redirects to /specialist/dashboard
Dashboard shows stats (Drafts, In Review, Approved, Changes)
Dashboard shows venue cards with status badges
Filter chips work (All, Drafts, In Review, Approved, Changes)
+ button navigates to /specialist/venue/new
Clicking venue card navigates to /specialist/venue/{id}
Edit form loads existing venue data
Multi-step form: Step 1 Basic Info (name, type, description)
Multi-step form: Step 2 Location (address, city, map link)
Multi-step form: Step 3 Capacity (min/max guests, price)
Multi-step form: Step 4 Amenities & Vibes (17 amenities, 12 vibes)
Multi-step form: Step 5 Photos & Videos (upload buttons)
Auto-save on Continue button click
VAM login redirects to /vam/dashboard
Dashboard shows stats cards (Pending, Approved, Changes Sent, Rejected)
Dashboard has DashboardLayout with sidebar
Stats cards are clickable to filter
Review Queue shows submitted venues
Admin Users page has 'Create Employee' button
Modal has role dropdown with 9 roles
Roles include venue_specialist and vam

seed_data_creation: Created multiple TEST_ prefixed venues during backend testing: TEST_VenueOnboard_*, TEST_NoPhoto_*, TEST_Reject_*, TEST_MediaDel_*

flow: 1. Specialist creates venue draft via POST /api/venue-onboarding/create
2. Specialist fills multi-step form (7 steps): Basic Info → Location → Capacity → Amenities → Media → Contact → Review
3. Auto-save on each Continue click via PUT /api/venue-onboarding/{id}
5. Submit for review via POST /api/venue-onboarding/{id}/submit (requires name, city, 1+ photo)
6. VAM sees submitted venues in review queue via GET /api/venue-onboarding/review-queue
7. VAM reviews via PATCH /api/venue-onboarding/{id}/review with action=approve/request_changes/reject
8. On approve, venue published to main venues collection via _publish_venue()

context_for_next_testing_agent: Venue onboarding workflow fully tested and working. Specialist creates drafts, fills 7-step form (auto-saves), submits for review (requires name, city, 1+ photo). VAM reviews and approves/rejects/requests changes. Approved venues published to main venues collection. Admin can create venue_specialist and vam employees. Test venues prefixed with TEST_. No critical issues found.
